arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says referee did something ‘bizarre’ he's never seen before in Arsenal vs Brighton
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has called referee Anthony Taylor's decision to award Brighton & Hove Albion a penalty after a clash of heads during Arsenal's 1-1 draw “bizarre”. I’ve never seen that in my life – and Saliba touches the ball.

arts.ttl: Arsene Wenger reveals his best-ever Arsenal signing - and it's not Thierry Henry
arts.sum: Arsene Wenger was Arsenal's manager for all of their Premier League title wins and the legendary manager has opened up on his best pieces of business in North London

arts.ttl: 'Do fans want to see these given?!' MOTD pundits on Brighton penalty
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Gary Lineker, Micah Richards and Danny Murphy discuss the penalty awarded to Brighton & Hove Albion in their 1-1 draw with Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta and Fabian Hurzeler react after Premier League statement delivers 'bizarre' verdict
arts.sum: Brighton earn a 1-1 Premier League draw with Arsenal thanks a second half penalty from Joao Pedro.

arts.ttl: 'It is just the difference' - Brighton defenders highlight where game could have been won against Arsenal
arts.sum: Brighton’s Dutch defenders Joel Veltman and Jan Paul van Hecke shared a similar verdict after they starred in a 1-1 draw against title challengers Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told they were lucky to avoid red card after William Saliba penalty incident
arts.sum: Arsenal's players were left feeling aggrieved during their 1-1 draw with Brighton when the Seagulls were awarded a controversial penalty by referee Anthony Taylor

arts.ttl: 'Hit me' - Joao Pedro weighs in on penalty debate after Brighton earn draw against Arsenal
arts.sum: Joao Pedro feels the officials were correct to award him, and Brighton, a penalty in the 1-1 draw against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta insists he's 'NEVER seen' anything like Joao Pedro's controversial penalty - with the Arsenal boss slamming the 'disappointing' decision which saw points shared with Brighton
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: Near the hour mark, Pedro had flicked the ball up and William Saliba, in attempting to head the ball, made contact with the Brazilian's head.

arts.ttl: Greg Taylor wants to stay at Celtic as transfer stance set out despite red-hot Kieran Tierney pursuit
arts.sum: Hoops left-back Taylor is out of contract at Parkhead this summer and has so far failed to agree a new deal

arts.ttl: 'Never seen this in my life' - was 'bizarre' penalty harsh on Arsenal?
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is left bemoaning a penalty decision he calls "bizarre" as his side's Premier League title challenge suffers a setback at Brighton.
